subcodes.title: Words to Mr Remey and Mr Latimer, spoken on 1914-10-15
subcodes.first_line: When you return to America say to all the believers in my behalf that whenever a person comes to that country
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای را بدانید که هر کسی در آمریکا به اسم من بخواهد پول جمع کند ابدا تعلقی به ما ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @service to others; to the Cause of God
